## Summary

Describe the focused change and its user-visible effect.

## Verification

- [ ] `pnpm test`
- [ ] `pnpm check`
- [ ] `node --test scripts/docsContract.test.mjs` when public onboarding changed
- [ ] Relevant manual verification completed or explained below

## Privacy and safety

- [ ] Tests, fixtures, screenshots, and logs contain only synthetic or sanitized data
- [ ] No MCP tokens, credentials, raw private configuration, workspace IDs, workspace contents, private links, or production user data are included
- [ ] Tool, scope, authentication, configuration, security, and troubleshooting docs were updated if behavior changed

## Notes

List skipped checks, known limitations, or follow-up work. Write `None` when
there are none.
